title: Pokémon GO
notes: Trainers, we hope you’re enjoying your adventure in Pokémon GO! We update the app regularly with new events and features, so make sure to check the in-game News to stay up to date.

title: Kingshot
notes:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: The Prestige Shop has been fully upgraded, and the brand-new Prestige Merit Shop is now available! The Ageless Voidstar Skin Series has been upgraded, with new rally skins and other deluxe skins added. After completing the Ageless Voidstar Puzzle, you can also obtain an exclusive domain effect and Prestige Pouch for an even more premium experience.
Successfully unlocking the Skin Series will trigger a server-wide announcement to showcase your extraordinary honor!

title: Last War:Survival
notes:
Improvements:
1. Removed the notification popup above Kimberly's model in the Initial Buy event at the Base.
2. The level cap for all bosses in the [Rampage Boss] event has been adjusted to [15].

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. Added new Lightning Tatari: Glowfly with unique Horde Invasion skills.
2. New Tier 4: Humbug→Hierotyrus (Rock), Zaplet→Umbraveil (Lightning).
3. Island Goldrush: Territory Defenders, faster point gains, league rewards final day.
4. Battle: class adjustments, Sand Control/Warship Roll fixes, Dojo bugfix.
5. Evolve Trials: preview higher tiers, event indicators, accurate switch tips.
6. Social: no invites/msgs from blocked players, profile via own avatar.

We've got a new update for Billionaire Casino. Read the below to see what changes you can expect!
As always, we're constantly working to improve the game experience for you. We've added minor tweaks and other bug fixes so you can feel even right at home while spinning!
See you at the Casino! Enjoy spinning and win big!
Let's play together and #StayHuuuge!

title: Forge Master – Idle RPG

title: RAID: Shadow Legends
notes:
New in 11.65.0:

FEATURES:
- Added the Win Streak mode in Live Arena & improved Live Arena matchmaking
- Added Quick Battle option to Chimera Battles
- Added 40 new Gemstones, earned from Live Arena
- Introduced the ability to assign duplicate Mythical Champions as Faction Guardians in the Guardian Ring
- Rebalanced the Plarium Points Program so users can progress faster
- Increased the chances of summoning Perfect Souls for specific Champions in the Altar of Souls' Wishlist
- Champion rebalance

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games

title: Lords Mobile: Kingdom Wars
notes:
Football fever has gripped not just the world, but the Kingdoms of Athena as well!
Take part in the Lords Ball Carnival to get an event Castle Skin, Army Skin, Route Skin, Turf Decorations, Emotes, and many more!

# Various UI adjustments:
．Guild Fest: Added special quest requirement note to Gear Crafting quests: "Must unlock the Lunar Foundry to complete quest"
．Hero Stages: Added Hero Ultimate skill range display during Auto Battle
．Revamped the Shelter's interface (Only affects Quick Battle)
